description: The response from a CRM search operation.
name: SearchResponse

total.description: The total number of records matching the search criteria.

results.description: The matching CRM records for the current page.

items.description: A CRM object record returned from a search.

id.description: The unique identifier for the CRM record.

properties.description: The CRM record's properties as key-value pairs.

createdAt.description: The date and time the record was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the record was last updated.

archived.description: Whether the record has been archived.

next.description: Information for retrieving the next page of results.

after.description: The cursor token to use in the after parameter for the next page.

link.description: A URL link to the next page of results.
